subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí! Upon thee be the eternal Glory of God! God willing, mayest thou be favored with His special bounties and hold fast to the cord of righteousness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی علیک بهاء الله الابدی انشاء الله بعنایات مخصوصه فائز باشی و بحبل تقوی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for nearness to God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @business; financial; property matters
